lib.appPassword.featureUnavailable: This feature is not available while using an app password. Please sign in with your main password.
lib.error.connectionFailed: Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection and try again.
lib.error.rateLimit: You've reached the maximum number of requests allowed. Please try again later.
lib.error.serverIssues: The server appears to be experiencing issues. Please try again in a few moments.
lib.error.uriNotRecord: Expected uri to resolve to a record
lib.moderation.generalWarning: This content has received a general warning from moderators.
lib.moderation.hiddenByModerators: This content has been hidden by the moderators.
lib.moderation.signedInOnly: This user has requested that their content only be shown to signed-in users.
lib.upload.postFailed: Post failed to upload. Please check your internet connection and try again.
lib.video.uploadLimit: You have temporarily reached the limit for video uploads. Please try again later.
